CustomField.description: Internal lookup to the Global Partner (Account). Used by pricing logic to set GBTA Membership SKUs to $0 for included benefits (e.g., ITM, NATM, NBTA, VDR, DBTA, SBTA, FBTA). Populated by staff/automation; activation still required.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select the Global Partner account (e.g., ITM, NATM, NBTA, VDR, DBTA, SBTA, FBTA). When set and eligible, GBTA Membership prices at $0. Member still must be validated/activated. Internal use only; hidden from members.
CustomField.label: Global Partner
